abilities.description: When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.9c9ab6a42daa96e0]{Swear an Iron Vow} alongside the delegate in service to a faction or creed, add +1. Then, when you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.0d7f13818c1c19ed]{Reach a Milestone} on this quest, take +2 momentum. When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.985a5415860a99e9]{Fulfill Your Vow} on a diplomatic mission (formidable or greater), you may reroll one challenge die. On a strong hit with a match, mark 1 tick on your bonds legacy track.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.05909d6310d209a6]{Make a Connection} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.3de42d2d3cb78855]{Sojourn} alongside the delegate, they may influence your interaction with the potential connection or ensure a warm welcome in the community. If they do, reroll one challenge die. If you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.3de42d2d3cb78855]{Sojourn} this way and score a strong hit with a match, great kindness or respect is shown to the party; take +3 momentum or make an extra recovery move with an automatic strong hit.
When the delegate makes a move to defuse, reason, or negotiate, add +2 and take +3 momentum on a hit.
